title: Runtime-prove bridge hardware targets
description: Obtain independent post-reset bridge runtime evidence for the four valid firmware/bridge-zephyr hardware targets: heltec_wifi_lora32_v3/esp32s3/procpu, t_deck/esp32s3/procpu, t_echo/nrf52840, and rak4631/nrf52840. A build is insufficient; require main: ready plus lichen_l2 initialized (full framing) or an equivalent protocol/radio effect, with device identity, flash command, logs, and artifact hash.
acceptance_criteria: Each target has a physical or faithful emulator WIN/FAIL result with an independent late application and L2/radio oracle; commands, device/backend identity, artifact hashes, and logs are retained.
notes:
AUDIT EXECUTION 2026-07-16 supersedes BLOCKED classification for two rows. Bridge T-Echo FAIL: ELF f3c1a3f3fa16fe25c9321779e46f03f69c8b66b71c894abd932e4832ddf62963 built, connected, and emitted one TX, but UART stalled after L2 RX thread startup before main ready. Bridge RAK4631 FAIL: ELF babb4c5329b6f0d9e2c3b8f1834e137cbe9a06374ba75c073fabf3d99a6658f4 built, but Renode repeatedly polled unimplemented USBD EVENTCAUSE and produced no UART, simulator connection, or TX. Heltec and T-Deck remain BLOCKED pending faithful ESP32-S3 models or hardware. Evidence manifest SHA-256 8def11add29a6a5f43ed88d52712db88d53755170df7626e988b50bafbc66fd4.
FINAL ESP32-S3 ATTEMPTS 2026-07-16: Bridge Heltec V3 FAIL, ELF 9d2dcb0444adf1d63c4703c956479204f033d57f40f328eee4e10e6380c5c1e1; bridge T-Deck FAIL, ELF 2593f95198beeddfaca493634700c138e8228ecb9a9d9315f5edb6a467140b03. Both canonical builds linked ELFs (final packaging lacked intelhex), but Renode loaded low-address ESP32-S3 segments into unmapped ranges and produced no main ready, simulator connection, or TX. All four bridge hardware rows are now attempted FAIL; none remain BLOCKED. Superseding evidence manifest has 104 verified entries, SHA-256 a49d5fd7b6a9d47f064f5d13fb6ffad902be5d2948f11d25274ee834ddb8c7ef; credential scan passed.
Concrete remediation: nRF T-Echo/RAK4631 failures -> project-LICHEN-ynxn; Heltec/T-Deck ESP32-S3 execution failures -> project-LICHEN-cy6c.
TARGET-LEVEL CLASSIFICATION ERRATUM: the Heltec/T-Deck skeletal Renode attempts are emulator-backend FAIL evidence but cannot prove hardware-target FAIL because the model is not faithful. Final bridge target rows: T-Echo FAIL, RAK4631 FAIL, Heltec BLOCKED, T-Deck BLOCKED. project-LICHEN-cy6c remains the concrete path to faithful executable evidence.
close_reason: Classified: all 4 bridge hardware targets attempted with FAIL results (T-Echo/RAK nRF startup stalls, Heltec/T-Deck Renode mapping issues). No remaining BLOCKED. Evidence in audit manifests. Docs updated. Closed under io1k reconciliation of targets/fragments/classifications.
